summary: P1 features testing complete - Subscription flow, Chat enhancements, and Product Scraping all working. Backend 100% pass (19/19 tests). Frontend UI verified for all features.
passed_tests: SUBSCRIPTION: GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns plans (basic, pro, premium)
SUBSCRIPTION: POST /api/subscriptions/activate with plan=pro succeeds
SUBSCRIPTION: GET /api/subscriptions/my returns plan, active status, days_remaining
SUBSCRIPTION: GET /api/subscriptions/check-feature/telegram_notifications returns allowed=true for pro
SUBSCRIPTION: GET /api/subscriptions/my-limits returns plan limits
CHAT: POST /api/chat/online heartbeat working
CHAT: GET /api/chat/online/{user_id} returns online status
CHAT: GET /api/conversations includes is_online field in other_user object
CHAT: POST /api/chat/typing sends typing indicator
CHAT: GET /api/chat/typing/{conv_id} returns typing status
CHAT: POST /api/messages returns read=false for new messages
CHAT: POST /api/messages/{id}/read marks message as read
SCRAPING: GET /api/scrape/stores lists 21 stores including HomeMax, Bauhaus, Jysk, IKEA
SCRAPING: GET /api/scrape/search?q=стол&store=all executes search across stores
SCRAPING: GET /api/scrape/search with single store works
SCRAPING: Query validation requires 2+ characters
FRONTEND: Login flow working for all test users
FRONTEND: Chat page (/messages) loads with data-testid='chat-page'
FRONTEND: New chat button and user search working
FRONTEND: Message input and send button working
FRONTEND: Read receipts visible (CheckCheck and Check icons with data-testid)
FRONTEND: Subscription page shows 3 plans with PRO as 'ТЕКУЩ ПЛАН' (current plan)
FRONTEND: Product search page with 21 stores indicator working
seed_data_creation: Test messages created during chat testing (prefixed with TEST_READ_ and TEST_MSG_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features (Subscription, Chat enhancements, Scraping) fully tested and working. Chat page route is /messages (not /chat). Subscription page shows all 3 plans. Product search page at /product-search uses AI-powered image recognition to search 21 Bulgarian stores. Online indicators appear as green dots (bg-emerald-500) when other user is online. Read receipts use CheckCheck icon (data-testid='msg-read') for read and Check icon (data-testid='msg-sent') for sent.
